title: Trinkets and Baubles Jappa Pack
description: This resource pack makes Trinkets and Baubles the texture of the modules has become more modern
body:
This project depends on Trinkets and Baubles Reforked or Trinkets and Baubles.

.[https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets-and-baubles-reforked](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets-and-baubles-reforked)

.[https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets-and-baubles](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets-and-baubles)

This is a Trinkets and Baubles resource packages, the Jappa texture was added to the mod.For Trinkets and Baubles modification of. This resource bundle temporarily modified 44 of his textures. If anyone has any suggestions to put forward in the comment section, I am willing to listen to them.
